name: resume-builder
description: Generates formatted .docx resumes from JSON input — used by Claude Code job automation

scripts.test: node build-resume.js --data '{"summary":"Test resume output.","skills":{"frontend":"Next.js, React, TypeScript"},"experience":[{"company":"Test Co","role":"Engineer","dates":"2024–Present","bullets":["Built test system"]}],"projects":[]}' --output ./test-output/resume.docx
